items.final_wording: Describes knee pain location, stairs-related pain, giving way, instability, and hip groin or thigh pain, stiffness, walking pain, restricted movement, and early loss of internal rotation.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Osteoarthritis – 28
source.population: Adults with osteoarthritis symptoms, particularly middle-aged and older adults.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed healthcare facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for osteoarthritis-compatible knee and hip documentation in Dubai telehealth; partial for undifferentiated joint pain, acute injury, and settings outside Dubai.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Describes knee pain location, stairs-related pain, giving way, instability, and hip groin or thigh pain, stiffness, walking pain, restricted movement, and early loss of internal rotation.

items.rationale: Supports entered knee pain and function for meniscal symptoms; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Supports pain, swelling, bruising, restricted movement, weight-bearing difficulty, instability, loss of function, mechanism, timing, force, direction, pop or snap, aggravating conditions, and previous episodes.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Muscle Sprains & Strains – 47
source.population: People with muscle sprains or strains suitable for virtual assessment.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed healthcare facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for sprain- or strain-compatible injury documentation in Dubai telehealth; partial for broad foot, hand, sports, fracture, operative, or diagnosis-specific workflows.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports pain, swelling, bruising, restricted movement, weight-bearing difficulty, instability, loss of function, mechanism, timing, force, direction, pop or snap, aggravating conditions, and previous episodes.

items.rationale: Supports entered injury mechanism and symptoms for meniscal symptoms; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Identifies severe pain or swelling, discoloration, weakness, movement loss, numbness, coldness, deformity, persistent symptoms, fracture or dislocation concern, and clinician-selected radiography, ultrasound, or MRI.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Muscle Sprains & Strains – 47
source.population: People with muscle sprains or strains suitable for virtual assessment.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed healthcare facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for sprain- or strain-compatible injury documentation in Dubai telehealth; partial for broad foot, hand, sports, fracture, operative, or diagnosis-specific workflows.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Identifies severe pain or swelling, discoloration, weakness, movement loss, numbness, coldness, deformity, persistent symptoms, fracture or dislocation concern, and clinician-selected radiography, ultrasound, or MRI.

items.rationale: Supports clinician-assessed differential and imaging context for meniscal symptoms; no decision is generated.
